name: AuditEvent
description: Represents an audit event recording an action performed by a team member within the 1Password account.

uuid.description: The unique identifier for the audit event.

actor_uuid.description: The UUID of the user who performed the action.

action.description: The type of action that was performed.

object_type.description: The type of object the action was performed on.

object_uuid.description: The UUID of the object the action was performed on.

object_details.description: Additional details about the object of the action.

aux_id.description: An auxiliary identifier providing additional context.

aux_uuid.description: An auxiliary UUID providing additional context.

aux_details.description: Additional auxiliary details about the event.

aux_info.description: Additional auxiliary information about the event.

session.description: Information about the session in which the action occurred.

device_uuid.description: The UUID of the device used.

ip.description: The IP address of the client.
